title: glochidion xestophyllum
intro: Glochidion xestophyllum, also known as the "Makalani palm", is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall health, offering benefits such as improved cardiovascular health, reduced inflammation, and enhanced immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Glochidion xestophyllum are often made into teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
